ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the simulation's purpose */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions under which the simulation was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joints" (
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint */,
  "joint_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the joint (e.g., revolute, prismatic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the joint's function and role in the system */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the joint */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the joint */,
  "max_load" REAL /* Maximum load the joint can handle */,
  "service_life" INTEGER /* Expected service life of the joint in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the joint */,
  "time" REAL /* Time during the simulation (in seconds) */,
  "J1.w" REAL /* Angular velocity of J1 (in radians/second) */,
  "J2.w" REAL /* Angular velocity of J2 (in radians/second) */,
  "J3.w" REAL /* Angular velocity of J3 (in radians/second) */,
  "J4.w" REAL /* Angular velocity of J4 (in radians/second) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the joint during the simulation */,
  "load" REAL /* Load applied to the joint during the simulation */,
  "wear_level" REAL /* Estimated wear level of the joint */,
  "stress" REAL /* Stress on the joint during the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_data_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_id") REFERENCES joints ("joint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_data_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter if not specified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., run, view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
